title: Lendingkart is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Lendingkart is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lendingkart family as a Full Stack Developer in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lendingkart:
Lendingkart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lendingkart!
